name: 圣骑士的荣耀
description: 游戏开始时，提里奥获得圣盾保护
skillCode: var piece = context.rulePiece; if (!piece) return { success: false, message: '' }; addStatusEffectById(piece.instanceId, { id: 'divine-shield', type: 'divine-shield', name: '圣盾', currentDuration: -1, intensity: 1 }); addRuleById(piece.instanceId, 'rule-divine-shield'); return { success: true, message: piece.name + '散发出神圣光辉，获得圣盾保护！' };
